case_title: IN RE: TAMARA ROSE MARIE BERRY

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME HEARING SET FOR DEC-09-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 218
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-09-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 218
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER BERRY, TAMARA ROSE MARIE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECREE CHANGING NAME THE COURT ORDERS THE PRESENT NAME OF TAMARA ROSE 'MARIE BERRY IS CHANGED TO TAMARA ROSE 'MARIE BROUSSARD. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERRY, TAMARA ROSE MARIE
UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2002, ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR OSC FOR CHANGE OF NAME GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; CLERK: P. DIAS; REPORTER: LEWIS GILLIAN.

calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Dec-09-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Lewis Gilliam. Petitioner, Tamara Rose Marie Berry was sworn and examined. Court grants Decree changing Petitioner's name to Tamara Rose Marie Broussard. Decree signed in open court.
